cd /data/hxy/projects/RescueCredit
printf '%s' '' | base64 -d > /tmp/rescuecredit_causal_subset_bundle.tar.gz
tar -xzf /tmp/rescuecredit_causal_subset_bundle.tar.gz
source data_disk_env.sh
source .venv/bin/activate
python scripts/cloud/apply_causal_subset_v1_hotfix.py
pytest -q
chmod +x scripts/cloud/run_v2_causal_subset_smoke_2gpu.sh
tmux new-session -d -s rescue_v2_causal "cd /data/hxy/projects/RescueCredit && CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1,3 bash scripts/cloud/run_v2_causal_subset_smoke_2gpu.sh"
tail -f outputs/rescuecredit_v2_causal_smoke_seed42/console.log

# 跑完后按 Ctrl+C 退出 tail，然后返回：
cat outputs/rescuecredit_v2_causal_smoke_seed42/smoke_gate.json
cat outputs/rescuecredit_v2_causal_smoke_seed42/run_summary.json
